MECH_canvas_patchification_enriches_data.gloss: Canvas patchification enriches data space, reduces overfitting, learns spatial priors.

MECH_different_layers_focus_distinct_str.gloss: Different layers focus on distinct structures and task-specific patterns.

MECH_canvas_enables_augmentations_learn_.gloss: Canvas enables augmentations to learn geometric transformation invariance.

ASM_some_arc_tasks_ambiguous_admitting_m.gloss: Some ARC tasks are ambiguous, admitting multiple plausible rules.

MECH_visual_learning_directly_enables_ab.gloss: Visual learning directly enables abstraction and inference without language.

MECH_majority_voting_consolidates_multi_.gloss: Majority voting consolidates multi-view predictions to improve accuracy.

ASM_arc_colors_not_real_world_making.gloss: ARC colors are not real-world, making bilinear interpolation meaningless.

MECH_attention_maps_reveal_correct_pixel.gloss: Attention maps reveal correct pixel-to-pixel reasoning.

MECH_average_pooling_aggregates_multi_pi.gloss: Average pooling aggregates multi-pixel predictions for single output location.

MECH_test_time_training_refines_color_sp.gloss: Test-time training refines color and spatial arrangement, adapting to tasks.

MECH_demo_pairs_at_inference_enable_test.gloss: Demo pairs at inference enable test-time training.

MECH_task_embedding_visualization_sugges.gloss: Task embedding visualization suggests learning relations between tasks.

ASM_larger_models_can_overfit_hindering_.gloss: Larger models can overfit, hindering generalization in current settings.

MECH_offline_training_learns_visual_comm.gloss: Offline training learns visual common sense from the training set.

ASM_single_pixel_errors_invalidate_entir.gloss: Single pixel errors invalidate entire ARC predictions.
